home.title: Resolve support tickets faster with guided AI triage.
home.description: Centralize inbound issues, assign owners, summarize context, and generate tailored customer replies from one dashboard.
home.benefit1: Supabase auth and PostgreSQL-backed ticket management
home.benefit2: AI summary, prioritization, and reply suggestions
home.benefit3: Secure API routes with Zod validation and RLS-friendly data access
home.benefit4: Vercel-ready deployment with optional Render service config
home.footer: Configure either Google Generative AI or a local llama-server endpoint without changing the UI.

auth.setupAccess: Set up your support workspace access.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your inbox if email confirmation is enabled, or continue to sign in.
